homepage.heroSubline: Reliable contracting services across the Dallas-Fort Worth metroplex. Quality workmanship and customer satisfaction are our priorities.
aboutText: Alliance Contracting and Repair, LLC was founded on the principles of integrity, quality, and service. We're a family-owned business based right here in Fort Worth, dedicated to providing exceptional home repair and improvement services to our neighbors.

We believe in clear communication, honest pricing, and treating every project as if it were our own home. From small repairs to complete renovations, we approach each job with meticulous attention to detail and a commitment to exceeding your expectations.

We're proud to be a part of the Fort Worth community and actively support local organizations. We strive to build lasting relationships with our clients and contribute to making our city a better place to live.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.shortDescription: Protecting your home from the Texas elements with expert roof repair.
services.description:
The Texas climate can be brutal on roofs. From intense summer heat to hail storms and occasional ice, your roof endures a lot. Alliance Contracting and Repair specializes in diagnosing and repairing all types of roof damage, ensuring your home stays safe and dry. Whether you have missing shingles, leaks, storm damage, or just need a routine inspection, our experienced team will provide a thorough assessment and effective solutions.

We work with asphalt shingles, tile roofs, metal roofing, and more. Our roof repair services include leak detection and repair, shingle replacement, flashing repair, and addressing damage caused by wind, hail, or falling debris. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting repairs that protect your investment. We understand the urgency of roof repairs, especially after a storm, and offer prompt and reliable service to minimize further damage to your home.

Don't wait until a small leak becomes a major problem. Contact Alliance Contracting and Repair for a professional roof inspection and expert repair services. We'll help you keep your roof in top condition, protecting your home and family for years to come.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection to identify damage and assess the extent of the problem.
Step 2: Detailed estimate outlining the necessary repairs and associated costs.
Step 3: Professional repair using high-quality materials and expert craftsmanship.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the repairs are completed to your satisfaction.
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How do I know if I need roof repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include visible leaks, missing or damaged shingles, dark stains on ceilings, and excessive granules in your gutters. A professional inspection can provide a definitive assessment.

faq.question: How long does a roof repair take?
faq.answer: The duration of a roof repair depends on the extent of the damage. Minor repairs can often be completed in a day, while more extensive repairs may take several days.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency roof repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we understand that roof damage can occur unexpectedly. We offer emergency roof repair services to address urgent issues and prevent further damage to your home.

services.name: Bathroom Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Creating your dream bathroom with expert remodeling services in Fort Worth.
services.description:
Transform your outdated bathroom into a relaxing and functional space with Alliance Contracting and Repair's bathroom remodeling services. We understand that the bathroom is one of the most important rooms in your home, and we're dedicated to creating a space that meets your needs and reflects your personal style.

From simple updates like new fixtures and vanities to complete bathroom renovations, our experienced team can handle every aspect of your project. We'll work closely with you to understand your vision, develop a design that maximizes space and functionality, and select high-quality materials that fit your budget. Our services include: fixture replacement (toilets, sinks, showers, tubs), vanity installation, tile work (floors, walls, backsplashes), electrical and plumbing upgrades, and custom cabinetry. We handle all necessary permits and inspections, ensuring your project is completed safely and to code.

Whether you're looking to create a spa-like retreat or simply update an outdated space, Alliance Contracting and Repair can bring your bathroom remodeling dreams to life. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and let's discuss your project.
process: Step 1: Initial consultation to discuss your vision, budget, and design preferences.
Step 2: Detailed design and planning phase, including material selection and layout options.
Step 3: Professional installation and construction, with attention to detail and quality craftsmanship.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure your complete satisfaction with the finished project.

faq.question: How long does a bathroom remodel take?
faq.answer: The timeline for a bathroom remodel varies depending on the scope of the project. A simple update may take a few days, while a complete renovation can take several weeks.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for a bathroom remodel?
faq.answer: Permits are typically required for significant bathroom remodeling projects that involve plumbing or electrical work. We handle all necessary permit applications to ensure your project is compliant with local regulations.

faq.question: How much does a bathroom remodel cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a bathroom remodel depends on the size of the bathroom, the materials selected, and the complexity of the project. We provide detailed estimates that outline all costs upfront, so you know exactly what to expect.

services.name: Kitchen Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Transforming your kitchen into the heart of your home with expert remodeling services.
services.description:
The kitchen is often considered the heart of the home. Alliance Contracting and Repair specializes in kitchen remodeling projects that enhance functionality, aesthetics, and overall value. Whether you're looking to update your cabinets, install new countertops, or completely redesign your kitchen layout, our experienced team can bring your vision to life.

We offer a comprehensive range of kitchen remodeling services, including: custom cabinet design and installation, countertop replacement (granite, quartz, marble), backsplash installation, flooring upgrades, appliance installation, and electrical and plumbing modifications. We work with you to understand your needs, design a space that maximizes efficiency and storage, and select high-quality materials that complement your style and budget. Our team understands the challenges of kitchen remodeling and strives to minimize disruption to your daily life during the construction process. 

Let Alliance Contracting and Repair create the kitchen of your dreams. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and discuss your project goals.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your vision, budget, and desired features.
Step 2: Design and planning phase, including layout options, material selection, and appliance choices.
Step 3: Demolition and construction, with careful attention to detail and minimal disruption.
Step 4: Final inspection and walkthrough to ensure your complete satisfaction.
benefits: Creates a more enjoyable cooking and gathering space

faq.question: How long does a kitchen remodel typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of a kitchen remodel depends on the scope of the project. A minor update may take a few weeks, while a complete renovation can take several months.

faq.question: Do I need to move out during a kitchen remodel?
faq.answer: While it's possible to remain in your home during a kitchen remodel, it can be disruptive. We work to minimize the inconvenience and maintain a clean and safe work environment.

faq.question: What are the latest trends in kitchen remodeling?
faq.answer: Popular trends include open-concept layouts, smart appliances, energy-efficient lighting, and durable, low-maintenance materials. We stay up-to-date on the latest trends to help you create a kitchen that's both stylish and functional.

services.name: Flooring Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhancing the beauty and value of your home with professional flooring installation.
services.description:
New flooring can dramatically transform the look and feel of your home. Alliance Contracting and Repair offers professional flooring installation services for a wide variety of materials, including hardwood, laminate, tile, vinyl, and carpet. Whether you're updating a single room or replacing the flooring throughout your entire home, our experienced installers will ensure a flawless and lasting result.

We work with top-quality flooring materials from leading manufacturers and offer expert advice to help you choose the best flooring option for your needs and budget. Our services include: subfloor preparation, precise measurements and cutting, professional installation, and thorough cleanup. We take pride in our attention to detail and commitment to customer satisfaction. We understand that flooring installation can be disruptive, and we strive to minimize the inconvenience and complete the project efficiently.

From classic hardwood to durable tile, Alliance Contracting and Repair can help you find the perfect flooring solution for your home. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and get a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your flooring needs, preferences, and budget.
Step 2: Site assessment and precise measurements to ensure accurate material ordering.
Step 3: Professional installation by experienced and skilled flooring installers.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup to ensure your complete satisfaction.
benefits: Reduces allergens and improves air quality

faq.question: How long does flooring installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of flooring installation depends on the size of the area, the type of flooring, and the complexity of the installation. We provide estimated timelines during the consultation process.

faq.question: Do I need to remove my furniture before flooring installation?
faq.answer: Yes, it's best to remove all furniture and belongings from the area before flooring installation. We can assist with moving furniture for an additional fee.

faq.question: How do I maintain my new flooring?
faq.answer: The maintenance requirements vary depending on the type of flooring. We provide detailed care instructions to help you keep your new flooring looking its best for years to come.

services.name: Painting Services
services.shortDescription: Bringing color and life to your home with professional interior and exterior painting.
services.description:
A fresh coat of paint can revitalize your home's interior and exterior, enhancing its curb appeal and protecting it from the elements. Alliance Contracting and Repair offers professional painting services for residential properties in the Fort Worth area. Our experienced painters use high-quality paints and proven techniques to deliver a flawless and lasting finish.

We offer a comprehensive range of painting services, including: interior painting (walls, ceilings, trim), exterior painting (siding, fences, decks), drywall repair, and surface preparation. We take pride in our attention to detail and meticulous approach, ensuring that every surface is properly prepared and painted to perfection. We understand that painting can be disruptive, and we strive to minimize the inconvenience and complete the project efficiently.

Whether you're looking to update your home's color scheme or protect it from the Texas weather, Alliance Contracting and Repair can help. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and get a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your painting needs, color preferences, and budget.
Step 2: Surface preparation, including cleaning, sanding, and priming.
Step 3: Professional painting using high-quality paints and proven techniques.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup to ensure your complete satisfaction.
benefits: Improves air quality by reducing allergens

faq.question: How long does a painting project take?
faq.answer: The duration of a painting project depends on the size of the area, the number of coats required, and the complexity of the project. We provide estimated timelines during the consultation process.

faq.question: Do I need to move my furniture before painting?
faq.answer: Yes, it's best to move all furniture and belongings away from the walls before painting. We can assist with moving furniture for an additional fee.

faq.question: How do I choose the right paint color?
faq.answer: We offer color consultation services to help you choose the perfect paint colors for your home. We can provide expert advice based on your style, lighting, and existing decor.

services.name: Fence Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Securing and beautifying your property with expert fence services.
services.description:
A well-maintained fence provides security, privacy, and curb appeal to your home. Alliance Contracting and Repair offers professional fence repair and installation services for residential properties in Fort Worth and surrounding areas. Whether you need to repair a damaged fence, install a new fence, or replace an old one, our experienced team can handle the job with expertise and precision.

We work with a variety of fencing materials, including wood, chain-link, vinyl, and wrought iron. Our services include: fence repair (broken posts, damaged panels, gate repair), fence installation (new construction, replacement), fence staining and painting, and gate installation and repair. We understand the importance of a strong and durable fence, and we use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure a lasting result. We also understand the specific needs of Fort Worth homeowners, considering factors like wind resistance and local building codes.

Protect your property and enhance its beauty with a professionally installed or repaired fence from Alliance Contracting and Repair. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and get a free estimate.
process: Step 1: Consultation to discuss your fencing needs, preferences, and budget.
Step 2: Site assessment and precise measurements to ensure accurate material ordering.
Step 3: Professional installation or repair by experienced and skilled fence technicians.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup to ensure your complete satisfaction.

faq.question: How long does fence installation take?
faq.answer: The duration of fence installation depends on the size of the fence, the type of material, and the complexity of the installation. We provide estimated timelines during the consultation process.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for fence installation?
faq.answer: Permits may be required for fence installation depending on local regulations. We can assist with obtaining the necessary permits.

faq.question: How do I maintain my fence?
faq.answer: The maintenance requirements vary depending on the type of fence. We provide detailed care instructions to help you keep your fence looking its best for years to come.

serviceAreas.content:
Alliance Contracting and Repair, LLC is proud to offer comprehensive general contracting services to the residents and businesses of Dallas, Texas. From the iconic skyline to the charming neighborhoods filled with 1950s ranch-style homes, Dallas presents unique construction and renovation needs. We understand the importance of preserving the character of these established neighborhoods while providing modern updates and improvements.

Our team is experienced in handling the specific challenges posed by the Dallas climate, including hot and humid summers. Whether you're looking to remodel your kitchen, add an addition to your home, or require repairs after a storm, we are committed to delivering exceptional craftsmanship and reliable service. We are your trusted partner for all your contracting needs in Dallas.
serviceAreas.localContext: We specialize in renovations of the classic 1950s ranch homes found throughout Dallas, understanding the architectural nuances and common issues that arise in these properties.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Alliance Contracting fixed a leak in my roof after that crazy hail storm last spring. They came out quickly, gave me a fair estimate, and did a great job. Highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We hired Alliance to remodel our outdated bathroom. The results are fantastic! There were a couple of minor delays, but they communicated well and addressed our concerns promptly. We love our new shower!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Our kitchen remodel with Alliance Contracting was a dream! They helped us design a beautiful and functional space that we absolutely love. The team was professional, courteous, and always on time. Worth every penny!

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.text: Alliance installed new hardwood floors throughout our downstairs. The installers were meticulous and did an amazing job. The floors look gorgeous and have completely transformed our home. Very happy with the service!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: We hired Alliance to paint the exterior of our house. They did a great job prepping the surfaces and the paint job looks fantastic. There were a couple of minor touch-ups needed, but they took care of them quickly and efficiently.

reviews.name: Brian S.
reviews.text: My fence was damaged in a recent storm, and Alliance Contracting came out and repaired it quickly and affordably. The repaired section looks just as good as the original fence. I would definitely use them again.
